examples.name: The answer to the great question of life, the universe and everything is 42
First I greet "world" okay? I think the greeting should be "Hello, world!"
Maya borrowed *Emma*, due back on June 1, 2026. She returns it on June 6, 2026 and owes a £2.50 late fee — 50p for each day overdue
Noor borrowed *Kindred*, due back on June 1, 2026. When she asks to borrow *Beloved* on June 10, 2026, the library refuses: an overdue book blocks new loans
Ben borrowed *Dune*, due back on June 12, 2026. When he asks to borrow *Hyperion* on June 10, 2026, the library agrees
